settings.question: Achar kitne din tak fresh rehta hai?
settings.answer: Sahi tarike se store kiya gaya achar kai mahine tak fresh aur tasty rehta hai. Jar ko cool, dry jagah rakhhein aur hamesha dry spoon use karein.

settings.question: Kya isme preservatives hain?
settings.answer: Nahi. Hamare achar bina artificial colors aur preservatives ke banaye jaate hain — ghar jaisi traditional vidhi se.

settings.question: Delivery kitne din mein hoti hai?
settings.answer: Orders usually 3–7 business days mein deliver ho jaate hain, aapke city ke hisaab se. Dispatch ke baad tracking details share ki jaati hain.

settings.question: Main kaunse flavors order kar sakta/sakti hoon?
settings.answer: Aam, Nimbu, Mixed, Lehsun, Mirch aur seasonal specials — sab collections page par available hain.

settings.question: Return / exchange policy kya hai?
settings.answer: Agar jar damaged ya leak hokar aaye, to delivery ke 48 hours ke andar photos ke saath humse contact karein. Hum jaldi se replacement arrange karenge.
